subject: Unsuccessful payment for Business plan
body: I've been trying to pay for my Business plan subscription, but I keep getting an error message - 'Payment gateway timeout'. I've attempted to pay 3 times already and it's really frustrating. Can you please help me resolve this issue?

subject: Invoice for Team plan
body: Hi, I just wanted to inquire about my recent invoice for the Team plan. The total amount seems a bit higher than expected. Could you please break down the costs for me?

subject: Incorrect charge for wrong plan
body: I am extremely dissatisfied with the service. I was charged for the Enterprise plan, but I'm currently using the Basic plan. This is unacceptable. I demand a refund and a correction to my subscription.

subject: Successful payment for Grow plan
body: Hi, I just wanted to let you know that I was able to successfully pay for my Grow plan subscription after trying a different payment method. Thank you for your patience and assistance. However, I did notice a small discrepancy in the payment confirmation email.

subject: Refund for Hiver Growth Plan
body: I'm writing to request a refund for my Hiver Growth Plan subscription. I was charged $49 on 02/10/2024, but the features didn't work as expected. The 'Cannot connect to Gmail' error persists. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this and process a refund as soon as possible.

subject: Unauthorized Charge for Hiver Pro
body: I just found out that I've been charged $29 for a Hiver Pro subscription. I never authorized this and I'm extremely dissatisfied. The 'Authentication failed' error I'm seeing is probably related to this issue. I demand a full refund and expect a resolution to this problem immediately.

subject: Requesting Refund for Hiver Team Plan
body: I'm reaching out to request a refund for my Hiver Team Plan subscription. Due to company restructuring, we no longer need this service. Our order ID is #HTP0012. We were charged $99 on 01/15/2024. Could you please let me know the next steps to obtain a refund?

subject: Refund Request for Hiver Enterprise Plan
body: Hi Hiver support, I hope you're doing well. I'm writing to request a refund for my Hiver Enterprise Plan. Although I loved the features, we've decided to switch to an alternative solution. Our subscription ID is #HEP0051. We were charged $199 on 03/01/2024. I appreciate your help in processing the refund.

subject: Issues with Hiver's automated workflows
body: I've been experiencing issues with Hiver's automated workflows. Despite setting them up correctly, they're not triggering as expected. I've tried troubleshooting but the problem persists. Please help me resolve this ASAP as it's affecting my team's productivity.

subject: Error when assigning tasks in Hiver
body: Hi support team, I'm encountering an error when trying to assign tasks to my colleagues in Hiver. The error message says 'User not found'. However, the users are already added to our Hiver account. Could you please look into this and provide a solution?

subject: Hiver's shared inbox not syncing
body: I'm extremely disappointed with Hiver's performance. The shared inbox is not syncing properly, causing us to miss important emails. We've been using Hiver for months now, and this is the fourth time this issue has occurred. I expect a prompt resolution to this problem.

subject: Minor issue with Hiver's reporting feature
body: Hi Hiver team, I hope you're doing well. I've noticed a minor issue with the reporting feature. The data for the previous week is not showing up correctly. I've tried refreshing the page, but the issue persists. Could you please help me resolve this? Your support team is always so helpful!

subject: Unacceptable Service with Hiver
body: I've been using Hiver for a month now on the Business Plan, and the experience has been atrocious. Constant errors like 'Failed to Load Conversations' have made it impossible for my team to work efficiently. I expect immediate resolution to this issue.
key_facts: Error message: Failed to Load Conversations

subject: Frustrating Experience with Hiver's Support
body: I've been trying to get help with integrating Hiver into our Gmail for weeks, but every time I reach out, I'm met with generic responses that don't address my issue. The 'Authentication Failed' error persists, and I'm extremely disappointed in the lack of support on the Premium Plan.

subject: Demanding Refund for Hiver Services
body: The Hiver service on our Enterprise Plan has been down for three days, causing significant disruption to our operations. Despite numerous complaints, the issue remains unresolved. I'm demanding a full refund for the past month and expect compensation for the losses incurred due to your service's failure.

subject: Critical Issue with Hiver's Shared Inbox
body: Our team has been experiencing a critical issue with the shared inbox on the Growth Plan, where emails are not being synced properly, leading to missed communications. The error 'Sync Failed' appears frequently. I've tried troubleshooting, but the problem persists. I need urgent assistance to resolve this.

subject: Shared Inbox Features for Team Plan
body: Hi Hiver Support, I'm evaluating Hiver for my team. Can you tell me more about the shared inbox features included in the Team Plan? Specifically, I'd like to know if it allows for automatic email assignment and if there are any limitations on the number of users. Looking forward to hearing back from you.

subject: Error with Email Templates on Business Plan
body: Hi Support, I'm having issues with the email templates on my Business Plan account. Every time I try to save a new template, I get an error message saying 'Template save failed'. I've tried clearing my cache and logging out/in, but nothing seems to work. Can you help me resolve this issue as soon as possible?

subject: Customizable Dashboard on Enterprise Plan
body: Hey Hiver Team, love the new updates to the Enterprise Plan! I was wondering if the customizable dashboard allows for the creation of custom widgets? If so, are there any limitations on the number of widgets I can create? Really looking forward to exploring this feature further.

subject: Missing Features on Starter Plan
body: Hi Hiver Support, I recently downgraded to the Starter Plan and was shocked to find that several features I relied on are no longer available. Specifically, I'm missing the ability to set up automated workflows and custom notifications. Can you explain why these features were removed and if there's any way to get them back?

subject: Unable to login to my Hiver account
body: Hi, I've been trying to log in to my Hiver account all morning, but I keep getting an error message saying 'Invalid credentials'. I've tried resetting my password, but it's still not working. I have a meeting in an hour and I need to access my account ASAP. Please help!

subject: Account access question
body: Hi Hiver team, I just wanted to check if it's possible to add another admin user to my account. I've recently hired a new team member and I'd like them to have the same level of access as me. Could you let me know the next steps?

subject: Locked out of my account
body: I'm extremely disappointed in the level of service I've received from Hiver. I've been locked out of my account for the past 2 days and I haven't received any help from the support team. I've tried resetting my password, but it's still not working. I demand that someone looks into this ASAP.

subject: Account access inquiry
body: Hi, I'm trying to set up a new Hiver account for my team, but I'm having some trouble with the sign-up process. I've entered all the required information, but I'm getting an error message saying 'Email already in use'. Could you help me figure out what's going on?
key_facts: Error message: Email already in use
